planned_commands.command: ssh tokyo 'set -eu; REMOTE_HEAD=$(timeout 45 git ls-remote https://github.com/jiangwweie/dingdingbot.git refs/heads/dev | awk '"'"'{print $1; exit}'"'"'); test -n "$REMOTE_HEAD"; test "$REMOTE_HEAD" = cf87320b2c9581c86bb734ba2e7cd783efda67b9'

ssh tokyo 'set -eu; sudo -n systemctl stop brc-owner-console-backend.service; umask 077; set -a; . /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/env/live-readonly.env; set +a; DB_URL="${PG_DATABASE_URL:-${DATABASE_URL:-}}"; test -n "$DB_URL" || { echo PG_DATABASE_URL_or_DATABASE_URL_required >&2; exit 2; }; if command -v pg_dump >/dev/null 2>&1; then pg_dump "$DB_URL" -Fc -f /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/backups/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed.pgdump; else DB_USER=$(/home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -c '"'"'import os; from urllib.parse import urlparse; print(urlparse(os.environ["PG_DATABASE_URL"]).username or "")'"'"'); DB_NAME=$(/home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -c '"'"'import os; from urllib.parse import urlparse; print((urlparse(os.environ["PG_DATABASE_URL"]).path or "/").lstrip("/"))'"'"'); test -n "$DB_USER"; test -n "$DB_NAME"; sudo -n docker exec brc_prelive_pg_20260601 pg_dump -U "$DB_USER" -d "$DB_NAME" -Fc > /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/backups/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed.pgdump; fi; cd /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed; set -a; . /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/env/live-readonly.env; set +a; PYTHONPATH=$PWD /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -m compileall -q src; PYTHONPATH=$PWD /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -m alembic heads; PYTHONPATH=$PWD /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -m alembic upgrade head'

ssh tokyo 'set -eu; ln -sfn /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/app/current; sudo -n systemctl start brc-owner-console-backend.service; sudo -n systemctl is-active brc-owner-console-backend.service; set -eu; HEALTH_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/health; HEALTH_READY=0; for attempt in $(seq 1 30); do if curl -fsS "$HEALTH_URL" 2>/dev/null; then HEALTH_READY=1; break; fi; sleep 1; done; test "$HEALTH_READY" = 1 || curl -fsS "$HEALTH_URL"; set -eu; test -f /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed/deploy/systemd/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service; test -f /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed/deploy/systemd/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer; test -f /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed/deploy/systemd/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service.d/40-resume-dispatcher.conf; test -f /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed/deploy/systemd/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service.d/80-product-state-refresh.conf; sudo -n cp /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed/deploy/systemd/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service /etc/systemd/system/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service; sudo -n cp /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed/deploy/systemd/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer /etc/systemd/system/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer; sudo -n chmod 0644 /etc/systemd/system/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service /etc/systemd/system/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer; sudo -n mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service.d; sudo -n cp /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed/deploy/systemd/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service.d/40-resume-dispatcher.conf /etc/systemd/system/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service.d/40-resume-dispatcher.conf; sudo -n rm -f /etc/systemd/system/brc-runtime-signal-watcher.service.d/50-product-state-refresh.conf; sudo -n systemctl daemon-reload; sudo -n systemctl enable --now brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer; sudo -n systemctl restart brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer; sudo -n systemctl is-enabled brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer; sudo -n systemctl is-active brc-runtime-signal-watcher.timer; mkdir -p /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/reports/runtime-signal-watcher;
